name: Rose Geranium Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp Rose geranium leaves; finely chopped
4 Small rose geranium leaves for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together until light and fluffy. Beat in the egg, milk, and rose water.
2. Sift together the dry ingredients and add them, along with the chopped rose geranium leaves, to the creamed mixture. Stir until well mixed.
3. Drop spoonfuls of the dough onto a lightly greased cookie sheet and press one rose geranium leaf deep into each cookie.
4. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and bake for eight to ten minutes.
